subcodes.first_line: O Land of Ṣád! Where are they that loved God and His chosen ones, and where are they that stood firm in His service in every condition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ارض الصاد این من احب الله و اصفیائه و این من کان قائما علی خدمته فی کل حال
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom
